narrative:
Dunkirk / Blanchard (precinct in Hardin County) has 924 registered voters, with 55.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.3 percentage points.
